privacy_note: Evidence linker reads source-code paths and manifest metadata only. It skips memory, runtime, tests, ops, logs, and store bodies when building source references, and it does not read or print memory bodies, JSON/JSONL bodies, raw QQ payloads, tokens, timestamp values, or secrets.
